# USER-MANUAL.md Verification Report (Sections 14-19)
Generated: 2026-01-28

## Summary
Verified sections 14-19 (학원일정, 직원관리, 설정, 태블릿, 휴대폰, 상담신청페이지) against actual codebase. Found several discrepancies between documentation and implementation.

---

## Issues Found

### Section 14 (학원일정)
✅ VERIFIED OK - All features match code implementation

### Section 15 (직원관리)

❌ WRONG: Manual says permission exists for "초과근무 승인" (overtime_approval) → Code defines this permission in types (src/lib/types/staff.ts line ~24) BUT not displayed in admin/users page UI
- File: src/app/admin/users/page.tsx
- Permission defined but missing from UI permission selection

❌ WRONG: Manual says "수업일관리" permission exists in permission list → Permission exists in types (class_days) but NOT found in /app/admin/users/page.tsx UI
- Manual line 1444: Shows "수업일관리" in permission table
- Code: src/lib/types/staff.ts defines class_days permission
- Issue: Not rendered in admin UI for permission assignment

### Section 16 (설정)

❌ WRONG: Manual says "전화번호" field label is "대표 전화번호" → Code shows "전화번호" only
- Manual line 1503: "대표 전화번호"
- Code: src/app/settings/page.tsx line ~268: "전화번호"

⚠️ MISSING: Manual section 16.7 describes "상담 페이지 설정" feature → No such settings section found in code
- Manual lines 1611-1622 describe consultation page configuration UI
- No matching UI found in src/app/settings/page.tsx
- Consultation page exists at /c/[slug] but no admin settings for it

❌ WRONG: Manual shows "공무원/성인반" → Code shows "공무원/성인반" (label matches) but manual example table shows "성인반" only
- Manual line 1533: "성인반 수강료" table header
- Code line 475: "공무원/성인반 학원비 설정"
- Minor inconsistency in terminology

### Section 17 (태블릿)

⚠️ OUTDATED: Manual lists menu items including "강사 출근" and "미납자" → These pages do NOT exist in tablet version
- Manual lines 1666-1676 list tablet menus
- Actual tablet menus (src/app/tablet/layout.tsx):
  - ✅ 출석체크 (/tablet/attendance)
  - ✅ 학생조회 (/tablet/students)
  - ✅ 결제확인 (/tablet/payments)
  - ✅ 스케줄 (/tablet/schedule)
  - ✅ 상담예약 (/tablet/consultations)
  - ✅ 문자 (/tablet/sms)
  - ✅ 설정 (/tablet/settings)
  - ✅ PC버전 (/)
- Missing in tablet: instructor, unpaid (these exist only in mobile /m/)

❌ WRONG: Manual says tablet has "결제확인" menu → Correct, but in portrait mode the menu shows "결제" not "결제확인"
- Landscape mode: "결제확인" (line 30)
- Portrait mode: "결제" (line 42)
- Inconsistency between orientations

### Section 18 (휴대폰)

❌ WRONG: Manual says mobile main has "출석 체크" button → Code shows "학생 출석체크" (more specific label)
- Manual line 1734: "출석 체크"
- Code: src/app/m/page.tsx: "학생 출석체크"

❌ WRONG: Manual says mobile main has "강사 출근" button → Code shows "강사 출근체크" (more specific label)
- Manual line 1735: "강사 출근"
- Code: "강사 출근체크"

❌ WRONG: Manual says notification timing "매일 18시, 21시" → Code shows "18:00, 21:00" (same meaning, different format)
- Manual line 1765: "매일 18시, 21시"
- Code line 318: desc: '18:00, 21:00'
- Also this is for "미납자 출석 알림" not "수업일 미납자 알림"

⚠️ MISSING: Manual line 1765 says "수업일 미납자 알림" → Code shows "미납자 출석 알림"
- Slight label difference

### Section 19 (상담신청페이지)

❌ WRONG: Manual line 1791 says form has "학교명" field → Code has "학교" field (label is "학교" not "학교명")
- Manual: "학교명"
- Code: src/app/c/[slug]/page.tsx line ~431: Label is "학교"

❌ WRONG: Manual line 1799 says "소개 학생" → Code shows "소개해주신 재원생"
- Manual: "소개 학생 (소개해준 학생 이름)"
- Code: "소개해주신 재원생" with placeholder "재원생 이름 (해당 시)"

✅ VERIFIED: Reservation number change page exists
- Manual describes /consultation/예약번호 → Exists at /consultation/[reservationNumber]/page.tsx

## Critical Issues Summary

**Must Fix:**
1. Admin UI missing "수업일관리" and "초과근무 승인" permission toggles (defined in types but not rendered)
2. Manual documents "상담 페이지 설정" UI that doesn't exist in code
3. Tablet menu list includes pages that don't exist (instructor, unpaid are mobile-only)

**Minor Fixes:**
4. Label inconsistencies: "대표 전화번호" vs "전화번호"
5. Label inconsistencies: "출석 체크" vs "학생 출석체크"
6. Label inconsistencies: "학교명" vs "학교"
7. Label inconsistencies: "소개 학생" vs "소개해주신 재원생"

---

## Recommendations

1. **Update manual section 17.3** - Remove references to non-existent tablet pages (instructor, unpaid)
2. **Update manual section 16** - Remove section 16.7 (상담 페이지 설정) or implement the feature
3. **Fix admin/users page** - Add UI for class_days and overtime_approval permissions
4. **Standardize labels** - Align manual with actual UI text throughout
5. **Review tablet layout** - Ensure "결제" vs "결제확인" consistency between orientations
